title: Wave64 strict AI item coverage
description: Generate current end-to-end AI-operational Items rows for Plan-wide build QA visual review audio review runtime and release control.
notes: Rows require source citations section line range excerpt source key and structured evidence before completion.

title: Whole-artifact visual review gate
description: Ensure localized visual work cannot pass if unrelated full-frame defects exist.
notes: Global defects in hands face body lighting background contacts crop artifacts or prompt alignment block promotion.

title: Whole-artifact audio review gate
description: Ensure localized audio or visual work cannot pass if full-duration audio defects exist.
notes: Global defects in clipping drift wrong voice ambience missing foley bad timing mix or event mismatch block promotion.

title: Localized change regression gate
description: Ensure any mask edit prompt tweak model change rerun audio repair or frame repair is reviewed against the entire artifact.
notes: Target region pass is insufficient without global artifact pass.

title: Legacy citation integrity audit
description: Verify legacy Items master rows contain citation file full path section line start line end and excerpt.
notes: Legacy Items master citation required fields report zero missing rows.
